differentials.name: bile-stained vomiting delayed until after first feeding and increasing progressively
differentials.raw: bile-stained vomiting delayed until after first feeding and increasing progressively

differentials.name: Duodenal duplication cyst Severe duodenal obstruction is characterized by 2 air-fluid levels on the upright view ("double bubble sign"), the largest below the left hemidiaphragm (= gastric distention), the smaller on the right side of the spine (= dilated proximal duodenum).
differentials.raw: Duodenal duplication cyst Severe duodenal obstruction is characterized by 2 air-fluid levels on the upright view ("double bubble sign"), the largest below the left hemidiaphragm (= gastric distention), the smaller on the right side of the spine (= dilated proximal duodenum).
